11400 S Talman Ave, Chicago, IL 60655, USA

There's an apple tree in the side yard of a house. I don't know the type of apple but they look like good cooking apples. Abundant harvest. On private property: knock on the door, first! Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: June-September.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
11061 S Hoyne Ave, Chicago, IL 60643, USA

Dwarf crabapple. At the front entrance to the library. Public library, so public land, but ask if you pick anything. These are tiny and more appropriate for birds. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: May-September.
